stemHtml: CBs were forecast along your route. Flying in nimbostratus, you observe a lightning flash. What should you do?

options.a: Declare PAN PAN — you've entered a storm.
options.b: Transmit a special air-report — the CB is embedded.
options.c: CBs were forecast, no action needed.
options.d: Report at the next waypoint, 15 minutes away.
